title: 震撼连结
effectDetails: 当引导技能被激活时，同伴近战攻击会产生 4 米的冲击波，造成其 30% 的近战伤害。你的同伴造成的伤害会使你的技能效率提高 3%，持续 12 秒。最多 10 层。
tipKeywords: 与同类效果的叠加方式

provenance.excerpt: The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati .
The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati .
A channeled ability must be active for both the shockwave to trigger and to gain stacks of the Ability Efficiency bonus.
Stacks are gained on any damage dealt by your companion. Each stack has its own duration.
"Channeled abilities" that trigger Seismic Bond are the same abilities that triggers Arcane Intention . See list below.
Shockwave deals Impact Damage and has a 0% Status Chance .
Damage scales with increases to melee damage (e.g. Precision Conditioning ), but is unaffected by damage conversion and elemental damage bonuses.
Shockwave does not hit enemies protected with Overguard .
Status Chance can be added to with Mecha Overdrive to create Impact procs.
Shockwave can applies Status Effects via Manifold Bond .
Shockwave does not trigger Vicious Bond .
Ability Efficiency bonus is additive to similar bonuses such as Streamline .
A channeled ability does not have to be active to gain the Ability Efficiency bonus of existing stacks.
Testing with Hildryn 's Balefire has shown that it snapshots Ability Efficiency on cast.
Testing with Mesa 's Peacemaker has shown that it updates its energy consumption according to Ability Efficiency dynamically.
This section is transcluded from Arcane Intention § Eligible Abilities . To change it, please edit the transcluded page .
Does not qualify if Tectonic Fracture is used.
Does not qualify if Resonating Quake is used.
Only qualifies during the glass wall expansion.
Only qualifies while the gyratory sphere is in motion, not once it is deployed.
Only qualifies while the gyratory sphere is in motion, not once it is deployed.
Only qualifies during the initial expansion
Only qualifies while its arrows are in flight.
Using Artemis Bow 's alt-fire to loose Quiver's arrows does not qualify.
Only qualifies while actively controlling a projectile.
Briefly becoming visible while Prowl is active does not disqualify it.
Only the protective hold-cast version qualifies
Buff is lost on recasting, even if Larva grabs enemies.
Only qualifies when Hallowed Eruption is used.
Only qualifies during the casting animation.
Only qualifies when Iron Shrapnel is used.
